ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Subcategory ID of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period offered by the seller */,
  "shipping_information" TEXT /* Shipping information for the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who listed the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the product page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the seller */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the seller */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the seller is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the seller account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the seller account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is based */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been approved */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who edited the review */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was last edited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "is_main_image" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the image is the main image for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
